// GOOD: use split iterators directly without collecting
fn get_domain(email: &str) -> &str {
    email.split('@').next().unwrap_or(email)
}

fn parse_key_value(pair: &str) -> (&str, &str) {
    match pair.splitn(2, '=').collect::<Vec<_>>().as_slice() {
        [key, value] => (key, value),
        [key] => (key, ""),
        _ => ("", ""),
    }
}

fn first_line(text: &str) -> &str {
    text.lines().next().unwrap_or("")
}
